titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University College of Arts and Sciences Faculty records14-1-1269
titlestmt.author: Compiled by P. McCray

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-04-06 18:03:00 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University College of Arts and Sciences Faculty records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. College of Arts and Sciences

did.abstract: Consists of minutes of various Committees and Boards pertaining to academic life.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Consists of faculty minutes, and minutes and other records of the Administrative Board in Charge of Freshmen and Sophomores, Advisory Board for Underclassmen, Committee on Academic Records, Committee on Admission, Committee on Common Studies, Committee on Conduct of Examinations, Educational Policy Committee, Honors Committee, the Standing Curriculum Committee, the Special Committee on Curriculum of the College of Arts and Sciences, and the General Education Committee.

Records, 1959-1964, of the Special Committee on Curriculum of the College of Arts and Sciences include memoranda between the Committee and departments of the College regarding their curricula and requirements; curriculum proposals; changes in admission procedures and programs of study; report of the Committee and comments on the report; studies of accepted candidates for admission by the Office of Admissions; reports of subcommittees; minutes of meetings; and other records; much of the correspondence is addressed to or from Committee Chairman Robert B. McLeod or Secretary G. Ferris Cronkhite.
Records of the General Education Committee, chaired by Professor Theodore Lowi, date from 1975 to 1978.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Faculty records, #14-1-1269. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 9 restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
